hero.name: Corsini321
hero.subtitle_zh: 软件工程师 · 图形程序员 · AI 探索者
hero.subtitle_en: Software Engineer · Graphics Programmer · AI Explorer
hero.desc_zh: 纽卡斯尔大学游戏工程硕士 · 专业前 5%
hero.desc_en: Newcastle University MSc Game Engineering · Top 5%

about.text_zh: 我擅长从零搭建底层系统——渲染引擎、物理引擎、AI 系统、后端架构。拥有计算机科学本科与游戏工程硕士背景，一年半企业实战经验，正在探索 LLM 与强化学习在交互系统中的应用。
about.text_en: I specialize in building systems from scratch — rendering engines, physics engines, AI systems, and backend architecture. With a CS bachelor's and Game Engineering master's, plus 1.5 years of industry experience, I'm exploring LLM and reinforcement learning applications in interactive systems.
about.marquee_zh: C++ — Python — OpenGL — GLSL — 渲染引擎 — 物理引擎 — AI — 后端 — 数据分析 — ECS — 网络同步 — MySQL —
about.marquee_en: C++ — Python — OpenGL — GLSL — Rendering — Physics Engine — AI — Backend — Data Analysis — ECS — Networking — MySQL —

items.desc_zh: 基于 ECS 架构并接入实时图形渲染引擎的 3D 多人合作潜行动作游戏。实现玩家行为系统（移动/CQC/伪装）、四状态敌人 AI + 导航寻路、道具交互与死亡判定，集成音频系统并完成 PS5 平台适配，配套 ImGui 调试面板与性能排查。
items.desc_en: A 3D co-op stealth action game built on ECS architecture and integrated with a real-time graphics rendering engine. It features player behavior systems (movement/CQC/disguise), 4-state enemy AI + navigation pathfinding, item interaction and death logic, with audio integration and PS5 adaptation completed, plus ImGui debugging and performance profiling.

items.desc_zh: 基于 OpenGL 从零搭建的实时 3D 渲染引擎。前向 + 延迟双管线，PCF 软阴影，菲涅尔水面，Bloom 后处理，GPU 实例化草地，粒子天气，昼夜循环，骨骼动画，程序化体素树。涵盖 20+ Shader。
items.desc_en: A real-time 3D rendering engine built from scratch with OpenGL. Forward + deferred dual pipeline, PCF soft shadows, Fresnel water, Bloom post-processing, GPU instanced grass, particle weather, day-night cycle, skeletal animation, procedural voxel trees. 20+ shaders.

items.title_zh: 易碎品配送 · 物理引擎游戏
items.desc_zh: 全部核心系统从零实现。AABB/OBB/SAT/GJK 碰撞检测，四种 AI 敌人（FSM + A*），ENet 客户端/服务器联机，状态插值，第三人称相机，包裹评分机制。
items.desc_en: All core systems built from scratch. AABB/OBB/SAT/GJK collision detection, 4 AI enemy types (FSM + A*), ENet client/server networking, state interpolation, third-person camera, parcel scoring system.

items.desc_zh: 迭代囚徒困境博弈论模拟器。多态策略 + 工厂模式（10+ 策略），进化模拟系统（种群选择/变异/演化），Text / CSV / JSON 多格式输出。
items.desc_en: Iterated Prisoner's Dilemma game theory simulator. Polymorphic strategies + factory pattern (10+ strategies), evolutionary simulation (population selection/mutation/evolution), Text / CSV / JSON multi-format output.

education.sub_zh: 计算机游戏工程 · 硕士 · 前5%
education.desc_zh: 高级游戏编程(C++)、图形学、游戏技术。研究 LLM-Based Game Agents。
education.desc_en: Advanced Game Programming (C++), Graphics, Game Tech. Researching LLM-Based Game Agents.

education.sub_zh: 计算机科学 · 本科 · GPA 7.09/10
education.desc_zh: 图形学、算法、AI、数据库、云计算。优秀毕业生，连续两年奖学金。
education.desc_en: Graphics, Algorithms, AI, Databases, Cloud Computing. Outstanding graduate, 2-year scholarship.

work.desc_zh: 团队管理培训，用户咨询售后，协同技术部门优化平台。
work.desc_en: Team management & training, customer consulting & after-sales, collaborating with tech to optimize platform.

work.company_zh: 福宝商城 & 中福集团
work.desc_zh: 商城后端开发，接口设计，数据库搭建，系统运维与故障处理。
work.desc_en: E-commerce backend development, API design, database setup, system operations & troubleshooting.
